test.query: SELECT number % {cardinality} AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 5, 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT number, concat(toString(number), '-', lowerUTF8(toString(number * 31)), '-', toString(number % 97)) AS bucket FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY bucket FORMAT NULL
SELECT if(number % 10 = 0, number % {cardinality}, 0) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT toUInt8(number % {cardinality}) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % {cardinality})) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT toString(number % {cardinality}) AS k1, toString(number % 97) AS k2, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) LIMIT 10 BY k1, k2 FORMAT NULL
